title: Report an incident involving a consumer product or cosmetic: Reporting other issues, contact us - Canada.ca
content:
## Report an incident involving a consumer product or cosmetic: Reporting other issues, contact us
- Report an incident - consumers
- Report an incident - industry
- Report an incident - fire and safety authorities
- Reporting other issues, contact us
- Reporting other issues

## Reporting other issues
To report another type of product or issue, select the category below or view all forms:
- Adverse drug or medical device reaction
- Unfair trade practice
- Food safety or labelling
Please note that the personal information you provide is protected under the Privacy Act . We only share your personal information if you have given your consent in the form, unless the disclosure is required or otherwise authorized by law.
Incident Report - Consumer and Hazardous Products Safety Directorate Health Canada 219 Laurier Ave West Ottawa ON K1A 0K9
